div.head: The Minister in Switzerland (Harrison) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 2132. Foreign Office official just telephones that according to telegram from Swiss Legation Berlin representative that Legation is informed verbally by German Minister AlbrechtErich Albrecht, Head of Legal Department of Foreign Ministry. that German Government would be disposed to leave in camps all POWsPrisoners of War. as Allies advance provided Allied Governments would obligate themselves not to return to active duty against Germany such POWs. Foreign Office promises written aide-mémoire confirming foregoing.

Repeated to London for MurphyRobert D. Murphy, United States Political Adviser for Germany. to Paris for Widewing BMilitary code designation for Supreme Headquarters, Allied Expeditionary Force. to SpaatzGen. Carl Spaatz, Commander of U.S. Strategic Air Forces in Europe. for McDonaldBrig. Gen. George C. McDonald, Director of Intelligence, United States Strategic Tactical Air Force, Europe. attention Bradford and SHAEF for General BarkerMaj. Gen. Ray W. Barker, Chief of Division of Personnel at Supreme Headquarters, Allied Expeditionary Force, Europe. and to Caserta.
